name: audienti-cli
description: Use the Audienti production API through a local, agent-first CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Operate Audienti through its production CLI.
interface.longDescription: Install and use the Audienti production CLI for governed account, play, prospect, list, and operator workflows.
defaultPrompt: Set up the Audienti CLI for this machine.
Use Audienti to build a prospect list.
